/usr/lib64/ccache/cc -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libfawkes_amcl_pf.so -o ../../../../../libfawkes_amcl_pf.so CMakeFiles/fawkes_amcl_pf.dir/pf.c.o CMakeFiles/fawkes_amcl_pf.dir/pf_kdtree.c.o CMakeFiles/fawkes_amcl_pf.dir/pf_pdf.c.o CMakeFiles/fawkes_amcl_pf.dir/pf_vector.c.o CMakeFiles/fawkes_amcl_pf.dir/eig3.c.o CMakeFiles/fawkes_amcl_pf.dir/pf_draw.c.o  -lm
